title: dryoathyrium forsythii-majoris
intro: Dryoathyrium forsythii-majoris, also known as the major forsythia fern, is a type of plant species in the Dryopteridaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Dryoathyrium forsythii-majoris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dryoathyrium forsythii-majoris can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, and as a topical cream or poultice for external applications.
